## Meeting purpose

[Catch-up and career update between Nino and Marcel, discussing personal lives, professional experiences, and potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel left his previous company and started a successful AI-led content agency, reaching $105k MRR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Nino is freelancing and contracting for Anthropic, considering his next career move](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Both have experienced challenges with equity and startup environments, leading to a shift in perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [There's potential for collaboration between Nino and Marcel in AI-led growth marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Topics

### Personal updates

  - [Both have young children (around 2 years old)](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Discussing parenting experiences and challenges (e.g., teething)](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)

### Marcel's career transition

  - [Left previous company (Scale) under difficult circumstances, losing significant equity](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Started new AI-led content agency, reaching $105k MRR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Built team of 5 full-time employees and 15 freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Working with notable clients like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Nino's current work situation

  - [Left Linktree due to leadership changes and challenging work environment](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Now freelancing/contracting for Anthropic at $195/hour (\~$350k/year)](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Considering long-term career options and potential full-time role at Anthropic](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)

### AI industry insights

  - [Challenges of marketing in AI space due to dominance of major players like OpenAI](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Anthropic competing against OpenAI in enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Importance of sales enablement and differentiation for challenger brands](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

### Potential collaboration

  - [Marcel interested in working with trusted professionals like Nino](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Opportunity for Nino to learn about Marcel's agency operations](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Possibility of fractional growth roles for experienced marketers](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Future plans and initiatives

  - [Marcel purchased AI-ledgrowth.com, aiming to establish it as a category similar to PLG](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Both considering how to leverage their experience and networks in the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule another meeting to discuss collaboration opportunities in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Marcel to add Nino on Slack for direct communication](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Plan an in-person meeting (coffee or breakfast) in the near future](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Marcel to send Nino an invite for a breakfast meeting with a VC and marketing leaders in September](https://fathom.video/share/wHPF88ruFtiKyCWoc8y8sXBZzkVXxR5Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
